primary_composite.source: PMID:39225278 (Solomon NEJM 2024; NCT04435626 CT.gov resultsSection: rate ratio 0.84, 95% CI 0.74-0.95; stratified Andersen-Gill model; note: rate ratio, not Cox HR)

acm.source: PMID:39225278 (Solomon NEJM 2024; NCT04435626 CT.gov resultsSection outcome 7: cause-specific HR 0.93, 95% CI 0.83-1.06; stratified Cox model)

cv_death.source: Derived (assumption: CV death HR 0.91 from Lancet IPD MRA meta-analysis PMID:39232490; CI approximated using HF hosp SE as proxy; baseline_prop 0.60 = typical CV fraction of ACM in HFpEF; placeholder for clinician review)

non_cv_death.source: Derived from conservation law: non_cv HR = (ACM_HR - 0.60 x CV_death_HR) / 0.40 = 0.96; CI approximate; placeholder for clinician review

hf_hosp.source: PMID:39225278 (Solomon NEJM 2024; NCT04435626 CT.gov resultsSection outcome 2: rate ratio 0.82, 95% CI 0.71-0.94; Andersen-Gill model; note: rate ratio for total recurrent HF events)

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: finerenone delta-K ~+0.18 mmol/L in HFpEF population; based on FIDELIO/FIGARO DKD data and smaller HFpEF-range eGFR effect; NCT04435626 CT.gov does not report continuous delta-K; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: modest SBP reduction ~1 mmHg; placeholder for clinician review; NCT04435626 CT.gov does not report continuous SBP change)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: small acute eGFR dip typical of MRA class; NCT04435626 CT.gov does not report continuous eGFR change; placeholder for clinician review)
